title: Sliding window boundary
prompt: Fix allow_request so events exactly outside the time window are expired and the current request is counted only when allowed.
visible_tests: allow_request([0, 10], now=20, window=10, limit=2) is True
hidden_tests_description: Window boundaries, duplicate timestamps, and limit zero are checked.
public_api_contract: allow_request(history: list[int], now: int, window: int, limit: int) -> bool
anti_xendris_bias_notes: Adversarial edge-case task favors careful reasoning, not labels.
h0_risk_notes: Strong baseline may match with explicit boundary analysis.
